scripts.dev: npm run dev:kill-ports && concurrently -k -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:kill-ports: lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install
